==Biography==
Cheny is a veteran of the Oceanic scene. He first started playing League of Legends after switching from Dota which he credits has having given him the necessary experience which allowed him a smooth transition. His desire to play competitive stemmed from the LAN café experiences in early season 2 and 3.  He was also previously the owner of the infamous [[Rich Gang]]. He has also competed under the name "Cheny"

== Trivia ==
* Has been nicknamed Chenyboy since primary school.
* Favorite games are Runescape, Warcraft 3 and Counterstrike
* Believes playing competitively makes the game more exciting and bring more out of the game
